name: product_catalog_no_join_trap
description: Static product reference table — 50 products with pricing and inventory data. This file has NO date or temporal column and NO foreign key that matches any other uploaded file. It is used as a NEGATIVE CONTROL in the join discovery test: the data_validator agent should return zero join candidates when this file is uploaded alongside a time-series dataset. Any join proposed by the agent on this file would be a false positive.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Alphanumeric product identifier (P001–P050). Unique within this table only — does not appear in any companion dataset.

columns.name: supplier_code
columns.description: Internal supplier reference code (e.g. SUP-42). Does not match any column in companion datasets.
